positive: A cozy, storybook style illustration of a sleepy fox curled up next to a steaming mug of tea, surrounded by glowing fireflies in an autumn forest. Warm earthy tones, gouache painting, whimsical, detailed, folklore aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, neon, sci-fi, sharp edges
